title: thelypteris papilio
intro: Thelypteris papilio, also known as the Butterfly Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris papilio include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and crushing the fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used as a topical treatment.
